title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Delhi - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Delhi - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
